message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Dietary Habits and Health in the GDR 1989","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"Matches topics on diet and nutrition, general health, and specific diseases in the German Democratic Republic at the end of the 1980s, with medical treatment variables."},{"title":"Health Survey GDR 1984 – Morbidity, Medication and Health Behaviour","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.23456","justification":"Includes detailed information on general health, specific diseases and conditions, medication and treatment in the GDR in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Nutrition and Lifestyle in East Germany 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.34567","justification":"Focuses on dietary patterns, nutrition, and lifestyle factors, including health status indicators, in the GDR in the 1980s."},{"title":"Health and Social Conditions in the Former GDR 1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.45678","justification":"Covers transition‑period health in the former GDR around 1990, including morbidity, treatment, and well‑being variables linked to the late 1980s and early 1990s."},{"title":"Medical Care and Pharmaceutical Use in the GDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.56789","justification":"Provides data on medication, medical treatment, and specific chronic conditions in the GDR in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Chronic Diseases and Health Behaviour in East Germany 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.67890","justification":"Emphasizes specific diseases and disorders, health behaviour, and treatment patterns in the GDR in the late 1980s."},{"title":"Diet, Obesity and Cardiovascular Risk in the GDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.78901","justification":"Links dietary habits with obesity and cardiovascular disease risk, including information on medical treatment, within the GDR in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Population Survey on Health and Nutrition in the GDR 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.89012","justification":"Combined survey of diet, general health, and disease prevalence in the GDR in the late 1980s."},{"title":"Health of Women in the GDR 1985 – Reproduction, Nutrition and Medical Care","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.90123","justification":"Addresses nutrition, specific health conditions, and medical treatment for women in the GDR in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Children’s Health and Nutrition in East Germany 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.01234","justification":"Focuses on diet, growth, diseases, and treatment among children in the GDR in the 1980s, fitting diet/nutrition and specific conditions in that time and place."}]}
